emptyStateTitle: Select a model, or drop images/videos to generate
emptyStateHint: Drop .ply / .splat / .spz / .rad files to preview; drop images or one video to generate a 3D model
dragToSidebarHint: Drag images or videos to the sidebar to generate
quickControlsNoModelHint: Select a model to start quick adjustments.
quickControlsXrHint: Quick controls are disabled during XR sessions.
quickControlsDebugWaiting: Realtime camera and model pose readouts appear after a model is open.
revealEffectsOpenAria: Open reveal effects panel. Current effect: {{effect}}
revealEffectsMobileHint: Compact mobile entry. Pick an effect and return to the scene immediately.
helpSpeedMode: <kbd>Shift</kbd> Speed Up / <kbd>Alt</kbd> Precision - Control move & zoom speed
helpVRDesc: Tap VR button for immersive preview, move headset to look around
helpARDesc: View gaussian splat overlaid on your real environment (Quest 3/Android)
helpVRJoystickDesc: Left stick to move, right stick to rotate
helpVRResetDesc: Press A/X button on controller to reset position
zoomTooltip: Hold Shift + Scroll for Precision Zoom
gyroNotSupported: Your device does not support gyroscope
confirmDeleteFull: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
accessGateSubtitle: Enter the LAN access code to browse models, photos, previews and downloads.
accessGateSetupRequired: The owner needs to set an access code from localhost before LAN devices can browse private content.
accessControlHint: Unlocked remote devices can browse and download private content. Management actions stay local-only.
accessCodeSetupReminder: Set an access code before sharing this port on the LAN.
accessCodePlaceholder: New access code, at least 8 characters
accessCodeTooShort: Use at least 8 characters for the access code.
accessCodeSaved: Access code saved. Existing remote sessions were revoked.
remoteGenerationHint: When enabled, unlocked LAN devices can submit image generation and photo-to-3D jobs. Keep it off for browse, preview, and download only.
ownerOnlyAction: Only localhost can perform this action.
accessSetupPromptDescription: Sharp GUI is reachable from your LAN, and access control is not fully enabled yet. You can set it up later or stop showing this reminder.
accessSetupPromptPrivateResources: After enabling access control and setting a code, model lists, photo albums, previews, downloads and workspace files are protected.
accessSetupPromptRemoteBoundary: When access control is off, LAN devices can browse private content directly. Management actions still stay on this computer.
accessSetupPromptHttpsHint: Use HTTPS on LAN when possible. It encrypts traffic; the access code controls who may browse.
accessControlEnabledHint: LAN devices need the access code before browsing private content.
accessControlDisabledHint: LAN devices do not need an access code right now. Management permissions still stay local-only.
accessControlDisabledWarning: With access control off, any device on the same LAN that can reach this port can browse models, photos, previews and downloads directly. Enabling access control and setting a code is recommended.
accessControlRemoteDisabledHint: Access control is off, so this device can browse directly. Settings, deletion, restart and management actions remain local-only.
accessControlSavedOff: Saved: LAN access control is off
lanBindEnabledHint: On: other phones and computers on the same Wi-Fi / router can reach port 5050 via this machine's IP.
lanBindDisabledHint: Off: only this computer can open it; no other device can connect, even with the access code.
lanBindRestartHint: Saving will restart the server automatically to apply this.
accessGateHttpWarning: This connection is not encrypted (HTTP). Your access code and session are sent in plain text over the network. Enable HTTPS for LAN sharing when possible.
uploadingVideo: Uploading video and creating reconstruction task...
unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Drop model files (.ply / .splat / .spz / .rad), images, or one video (.mp4 / .mov / .m4v / .webm).
modelFormatHint: SPZ is 5-10x smaller with no visible quality loss. PLY preserves full original data.
formatToggleTooltip: Toggle model format (SPZ compact / PLY original)
convertAllToSpz: Convert All Existing Models to SPZ
lodHint: LOD can reduce splats per frame for very large scenes, but Spark must build LOD data while loading; single-image models may load slower.
lodPresetHint: When LOD is enabled, switches Spark LoD and foveation parameters instantly without reloading the model.
quickPresetHint: Presets keep LOD off for fast single-image previews. Use Manual to enable LOD only for very large scenes.
defaultRevealEffectHint: Saved to this browser on this device only. Default uses a lightweight standard particle reveal, and you can change it here anytime.
advancedSettingsHint: These options are intended for advanced tuning and debugging.
advancedSettingsAutoHint: Advanced options are hidden in preset mode to keep the experience simple. Select Manual if you need fine control.
lodCompareHint: Toggle between LoD and non-LoD rendering source for quality comparison.
lodCompareUnavailableHint: Comparison mode is available when current scene includes both LoD and non-LoD data.
radModeHint: When enabled, viewer tries .rad first and falls back to SPZ/PLY/SPLAT if RAD is unavailable.
radPagedHint: Enable chunked streaming for large RAD scenes. Turn off to simplify debugging.
xrUpdateHint: Auto uses Spark XR lifecycle. Manual mode keeps frame-loop update as a compatibility fallback.
hfHint: Unleashes native device resolution and disables anti-aliasing to restore extreme sharpness, at the cost of high performance overhead.
settingsRestartWarning: Changing workspace folder requires server restart
photoPathPrompt: Enter a local photo folder path
photoLocalOnly: Folder management is only available from localhost
photoNoAlbums: Add a local folder to start browsing photos.
photoNoAlbumsRemote: No photo albums configured on this host.
photoAlbumDeleteConfirm: Remove album "{{name}}"? Original photos will not be deleted.
photoChooseAlbumHint: Choose an album from the sidebar or add a folder.
photoUploadAccessDenied: This device cannot upload photos. Enable LAN access control from localhost and unlock this device first.
photoGridEmptyHint: This folder has no supported JPG, PNG, or WebP images yet.
photoMediaGridEmptyHint: This folder has no supported photos or videos yet.
photoVideoGridEmptyHint: This folder has no supported MP4, MOV, M4V, or WebM videos yet.
photoCacheDescription: Indexes, thumbnails, video posters, and temporary download packages. Originals are not included.
photoCacheClearConfirm: Clear generated gallery cache? This removes indexes, thumbnails, video posters, and temporary download packages, but never deletes original photos or videos. Cache will rebuild as needed.
photoCacheLoadFailed: Failed to load gallery cache status
photoOriginalLoadFailed: Original image failed to load. Refresh the album or check that the source file is still available.
photoVideoPlaybackFailedHint: This browser cannot play the current video. Please download it and play it locally.
videoReconStatusLoadFailed: Failed to load video reconstruction diagnostics.
videoReconRequiredMissing: ffmpeg or ffprobe is missing. Video reconstruction cannot start.
videoReconStableMissing: Nerfstudio / Splatfacto CLI tools are missing. Install them before starting a reconstruction.
videoReconCreateFailed: Failed to create video reconstruction task.
videoReconOutputPlaceholder: Model name in the output gallery
videoReconKeepIntermediateHint: Useful for debugging frames, poses and Nerfstudio logs. Uses more disk space.
videoReconSettingsHint: Controls the default preset for local video reconstruction. Per-task custom parameters are available in the generation dialog.
videoReconVramBudgetMeta: Resource guard for the local GPU
videoReconSettingsCurrent: Saved: video reconstruction defaults are current

videoReconQualityHint.preview: Fast sanity check for camera path and subject cleanup. Uses fewer splats and lower input detail.
videoReconQualityHint.high: Recommended for final-looking results on this machine: 2x input scale, focused cleanup and about 50 minutes for this 4K clip.
videoReconQualityHint.extreme: Pushes frame count and training budget for long offline runs. Use when time and VRAM are less constrained.
videoReconQualityHint.custom: Use when a preset does not fit the clip. Increase coverage, detail, or safety deliberately and watch the runtime and VRAM tradeoffs.

videoReconCustomHint: These values are applied directly to this task and are not saved as global defaults.
videoReconCustomFrameCountHint: More frames cover longer paths, but geometry and training take longer.
videoReconCustomIterationsHint: More iterations can refine detail, but each extra step costs time.
videoReconCustomDownscaleHint: Lower downscale keeps more input detail; higher downscale reduces VRAM pressure and noise.
videoReconCustomMatchingHint: Sequential scales to long walk-throughs. Exhaustive is more robust for fewer frames but grows quickly.
videoReconCustomCacheImagesHint: GPU cache can be faster; CPU cache saves VRAM for heavy frame counts or high input detail.

videoReconCustomValidation.frameCount: Target frames must be between 24 and 1200.
videoReconCustomValidation.iterations: Training iterations must be between 1k and 80k.
videoReconCustomValidation.exhaustiveFrames: Exhaustive matching is capped at 450 custom frames. Use Sequential for longer videos.

videoReconEngineHint.auto: Uses the currently verified stable 3DGS route while leaving room for future strategy changes.
videoReconEngineHint.stable: Always uses COLMAP + Nerfstudio Splatfacto. This is the route that produced the current clean high-detail result.

videoReconDependencyHint.required: ffmpeg and ffprobe decode metadata and extract frames.
videoReconDependencyHint.stable: Nerfstudio Splatfacto trains and exports the Gaussian Splat model.

videoReconError.video_reconstruction_dependency_missing: Required video reconstruction dependencies are missing.
videoReconError.video_reconstruction_dependencies_checki: Local reconstruction tools are still being checked. Please try again in a moment.
videoReconError.video_reconstruction_stable_unavailable: The stable Nerfstudio / Splatfacto route is unavailable.
videoReconError.video_reconstruction_invalid_request: The video reconstruction request contains invalid options.
videoReconError.video_reconstruction_source_unavailable: The source video is unavailable or no longer in the configured album.
videoReconError.video_reconstruction_oom: GPU memory ran out. Try a lower quality preset or fewer frames.
videoReconError.video_reconstruction_output_missing: The reconstruction finished without a usable PLY output.
videoReconError.video_reconstruction_spz_failed: SPZ compression failed, but the PLY output was kept.
videoReconError.video_reconstruction_unsupported_video: Unsupported video format. Please use MP4, MOV, M4V, or WebM.
